# The MCA Guide
# https://themcaguide.com
# Free MCA education for small business owners

## About
The MCA Guide is a free educational website created by Bar Alezrah, a small business owner, to help other business owners understand merchant cash advances (MCAs), avoid common mistakes, and find better financing options.

## Content Structure

### Guides (Pillar Pages)
- /guides/what-is-mca - What is a Merchant Cash Advance? The Complete Guide
- /guides/mca-vs-business-loans - MCA vs Business Loans: What's the Real Difference?
- /guides/mca-debt-settlement - MCA Debt Settlement: A Complete Guide for Business Owners
- /guides/mca-alternatives - MCA Alternatives: 8 Better Ways to Fund Your Small Business
- /guides/how-to-get-out-of-mca-debt - How to Get Out of MCA Debt: A Step-by-Step Survival Guide

### Blog: Before Taking an MCA
- /articles/fix-cashflow-before-mca - 10 Ways to Fix Your Cash Flow
- /articles/emergency-business-funding-not-mca - 7 Emergency Funding Options That Aren't an MCA
- /articles/small-business-grants-guide - Free Money: A Small Business Owner's Guide to Grants
- /articles/invoice-factoring-guide - Invoice Factoring: Get Paid Now Without an MCA
- /articles/sba-loan-guide-small-business - SBA Loans Explained
- /articles/revenue-based-financing - Revenue Based Financing: A Smarter Alternative to MCAs

### Blog: If You Really Need an MCA
- /articles/best-mca-companies - Best MCA Companies in 2026: An Honest Review
- /articles/mca-contract-red-flags - 8 Red Flags in MCA Contracts
- /articles/mca-broker-vs-direct-funder - MCA Broker vs Direct Funder
- /articles/hidden-fees-in-mca - Hidden Fees in MCA Contracts
- /articles/how-to-negotiate-mca-terms - How to Negotiate Better MCA Terms
- /articles/mca-for-bad-credit - MCA for Bad Credit: What You Need to Know
- /articles/mca-pros-and-cons - MCA Pros and Cons: The Honest Truth
- /articles/is-mca-a-loan - Is an MCA a Loan?
